description: Lane-hopping arcade game — cross the road dodging cars, then ride logs across the river to reach lily pads. Portrait mobile-friendly layout, swipe + arrow-key controls, RAF game loop, localStorage high score.
qualityNotes: Hand-curated lane-based traffic + log-raft logic + lily-pad goal-state machine. Portrait layout with touch-swipe controls. Preserve the lane-array model and per-row velocity grouping when modifying. Use generic protagonist art (e.g., colored animal sprite); avoid recreating recognizable arcade-character art.
